ugc_video_rules: Always use image-to-video mode: generate anchor frame first (still image), then animate
Anchor frame must be generated using the full 6-layer prompt system before video call
cfg_scale must stay between 0.4-0.6 for natural motion — higher values cause over-animation
aspect_ratio must be 9:16 for all UGC vertical video formats
Prompt for video motion must describe movement only — character identity is locked in anchor frame
Do not describe appearance in video prompt — motion descriptors only (e.g., 'slowly raises product, smiles, tilts head slightly')

example_call.prompt: gently raises product toward camera, soft smile, slight head tilt, natural handheld camera shake
